title: ‘Make a deal before it’s too late’: Trump warns Iran as bridge strike toll rises to 8
summary_full: In a bold address, President Trump cautioned Iran, calling for immediate negotiations following US airstrikes that struck a significant bridge just outside of Tehran and a prominent medical institution. Posting a video showcasing the damage to the Karaj bridge, Trump pledged to intensify measures. This development heightens regional instability, hinting at a more aggressive approach from the United States.
